title: Warrant Chamber
public_claim: Warrant Chamber is a manuscript-centered evidence governance room handoff, also called The House of Evidence.
distinctive_mechanism: It specifies a room for preserving the relation between text, claim, source, counter-source, warrant strength, dissent, judgment, repair, revision state, and certification, with data model, workflow, screen blueprint, role-permission, event-taxonomy, design-token, SQL, GraphQL, and SVG architecture artifacts.
